overview: WW Stock is a full-stack inventory management web app for Indian ethnic wear clothing. It supports multi-product catalog management with custom sizes per product, color sub-options with photos, IN/OUT stock tracking, activity logs, role-based access (admin/user), and PIN-based login. Built for clothing retailers managing sarees, kurtas, lehengas, and other garments.
features: Color options as sub-products with individual photos and stock
Real-time total stock and product count for all users
Stock IN/OUT entry with per-size tracking
Product-specific background images on stock pages
Active logs with green IN / red OUT badges
Admin: add products, manage users, export logs to Excel
All users: view logs, edit own entry once
Indian ethnic wear background imagery at 20-25% opacity
Application credits: Mitul Gopani & Krenil Vaghasiya
